description: GitHub Trending AI/Open Source Projects - April 2026

articles.title: DeepGEMM - DeepSeek-AI High-Performance FP8 GEMM Library for LLMs
articles.description: A specialized library for optimizing General Matrix Multiplication (GEMM) operations for LLMs with efficient FP8 kernels

articles.title: OpenAI Agents SDK - Lightweight Python Framework for Multi-Agent Workflows
articles.description: Official OpenAI SDK for building multi-agent workflows in Python, available via PyPI

articles.title: Thunderbolt - Thunderbird's User-Controlled AI Platform
articles.description: Open-source initiative allowing users to choose AI models, own their data, and avoid vendor lock-in

articles.title: Evolver - Self-Evolution Engine for AI Agents Based on Genome Evolution Protocol
articles.description: Framework where AI agents undergo iterative improvement using bio-inspired genomic principles

articles.title: Omi AI - Open-Source Second Brain That Sees Your Screen
articles.description: Personal AI assistant that monitors screen and conversations to provide proactive guidance

articles.title: claude-desktop-debian - Claude Desktop for Debian Linux
articles.description: Build scripts to repackage Claude Windows app for Debian-based Linux distributions

articles.title: Dive into LLMs (动手学大模型) - Comprehensive LLM Programming Tutorial
articles.description: Hands-on programming tutorial series for mastering Large Language Models

articles.title: Holos - QEMU/KVM with Compose-style YAML
articles.description: Compose-style runtime on QEMU/KVM with GPU passthrough, health checks, and cloud-init support

articles.title: awawausb - WebUSB Extension for Firefox
articles.description: Firefox extension enabling WebUSB API support

articles.title: Soul Player C64 - Transformer on Commodore 64
